title: Leaf Slime (S)

moves.title: Goop
effects: Add 1 Slimed card to player's discard pile

move_pattern: Starts with a random choice between Tackle and Goop (neither can repeat consecutively). Alternates randomly each turn.
notes: Goop adds 1 Slimed status card to the player's discard pile. Move ID BUTT_MOVE strips to BUTT which maps to the 'Tackle' localization title.
